description.value:
A very rare text of which only a few copies exist. The oldest is written on clay tablets in Sumerian, with later Aramaic and Greek copies on parchment scrolls. Describes powerful symbols and gives detailed instructions on inscribing them to form protective wards, glyphs, and amulets. Rare because most copies are deliberately destroyed by cult members seeking to limit defenses against their dark arts and dread masters.

LanguageSumerian, Aramaic, and Greek
AuthorUnknown
Date4th millennium B.C.
Sanity Loss1D8
Cthulhu Mythos+2/+4 percentiles
Mythos Rating18
Study (weeks)20

Spells Contained

  • Create Amulet
  • Create Bulla
  • Create Charm
  • Create Sign of Barzai
  • Elder Sign
